headline: GE Aerospace Rises 12.2% in Six Months: How Should You Play the Stock?
summary: GE gains 12.2% in six months as commercial and defense aerospace demand fuel momentum, but costs and valuation remain concerns.

headline: Here’s What Lifted General Dynamics (GD) in Q1
summary: Greenskeeper Asset Management, an independent firm that specializes in disciplined value investing, recently released its Q1 2026 scorecard. A copy is available to download here. The Middle East conflict triggered a sharp stock sell-off in the market, resulting in the Greenskeeper Value Fund posting a -8.1% return in Q1. Despite this challenging quarter, the fund […]
